name: Hungarian Pork & Roasted Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1/3 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables (16 oz), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the pork in flour.
2. Brown the pork in hot oil in a roasting pan until it reaches an internal temperature of 400°F for 15 minutes.
3. Add paprika and onion, water, caraway seed, garlic, and salt to the roasting pan.
4. Cover tightly and bake at 325°F until the meat is tender.
5. Add peppers, tomatoes, and stock. Simmer covered for 15 minutes.
6. Stir in VEG-ALL. Simmer covered for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Serve with wide noodles or rice.
